# MIRAC Technologies
> Enterprise ERP, AI Automation & Custom Software Development

MIRAC Technologies is a premium enterprise technology firm based in
Lahore, Pakistan. We design, build, and deploy mission-critical digital
systems for large organizations across Pakistan and the GCC region.

## What We Do
- ERP Development (SAP, Oracle, Odoo, custom builds)
- AI Automation & Agent Systems
- MRP Manufacturing Systems
- Custom Enterprise Software
- System Integration & APIs
- Payments & Fintech Infrastructure
- Data Analytics & BI
- Cloud Architecture & DevOps
- Blockchain & Web3

## Key Facts
- 50+ enterprise projects delivered
- 30+ active long-term clients
- 12+ industries served
- 99.9% system uptime
- 0 missed deadlines in 24 months
- Based in Lahore, Pakistan
- Serving Pakistan and GCC markets
- Minimum project: $25,000
- Fixed-price contracts only

## Industries
Mining, Hotels, Logistics, Manufacturing, Real Estate,
Healthcare, Retail, Government, Banking, Education, Oil & Gas, Telecom
